title: Comment

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

user.description: The author of the Comment, if the author is a User. If the third party does not support specifying an author, we will append "[Posted on behalf of {name}]" to the comment.

contact.description: The author of the Comment, if the author is a Contact.If the third party does not support specifying an author, we will append "[Posted on behalf of {name}]" to the comment.

html_body.description: The comment's text body formatted as html.

ticket.description: The ticket associated with the comment.

is_private.description: Whether or not the comment is internal.

remote_created_at.description: When the third party's comment was created.

remote_was_deleted.description: Indicates whether or not this object has been deleted in the third party platform. Full coverage deletion detection is a premium add-on. Native deletion detection is offered for free with limited coverage. [Learn more](https://docs.merge.dev/integrations/hris/supported-features/).

description:
# The Comment Object
### Description
The `Comment` object is used to represent a comment on a ticket.
